title: Loyalty tiers to be dynamically received from Salesforce
goal: To be able to add details to the OMS tabs so that users can easily find the tab information, when they have many tabs open. Highlight the minimum stock threshold in the stock column.
description: Adding details of the tab allows users to find the information of that tab easily when they have multiple tabs ope. Additionally, a prefix of "UAT" is added to the tab details when user is using the UAT environment and "OMS" prefix when using the Prod environment.  The stock column displays the minimum threshold of the stock when the stock. This allows store users to be aware of the stocks before placing an order.
